segments.text: In the seventh month, in the twenty-first day of the month, Yahweh’s word came by Haggai the prophet, saying,
Speak now to Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Joshua the son of Jehozadak, the high priest, and to the remnant of the people, saying,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: ‘Who is left among you who saw this house in its former glory? How do you see it now? Isn’t it in your eyes as nothing?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Yet now be strong, Zerubbabel,’ says Yahweh. ‘Be strong, Joshua son of Jehozadak, the high priest. Be strong, all you people of the land,’ says Yahweh, ‘and work, for I am with you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: This is the word that I covenanted with you when you came out of Egypt, and my Spirit lived among you. ‘Don’t be afraid.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For this is what Yahweh of Armies says: ‘Yet once more, it is a little while, and I will shake the heavens, the earth, the sea, and the dry land;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and I will shake all nations. The treasure of all nations will come, and I will fill this house with glory, says Yahweh of Armies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The silver is mine, and the gold is mine,’ says Yahweh of Armies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: ‘The latter glory of this house will be greater than the former,’ says Yahweh of Armies; ‘and in this place I will give peace,’ says Yahweh of Armies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: In the twenty-fourth day of the ninth month, in the second year of Darius, Yahweh’s word came by Haggai the prophet, saying,
Yahweh of Armies says: Ask now the priests concerning the law, saying,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: ‘If someone carries holy meat in the fold of his garment, and with his fold touches bread, stew, wine, oil, or any food, will it become holy?’
segments.speaker: The priests

segments.text: The priests answered,
No.
segments.speaker: The priests

segments.text: Then Haggai said,
If one who is unclean by reason of a dead body touches any of these, will it be unclean?
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: The priests answered,
It will be unclean.
segments.speaker: The priests

segments.text: Then Haggai answered,
‘So is this people, and so is this nation before me,’ says Yahweh; ‘and so is every work of their hands. That which they offer there is unclean.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: Now, please consider from this day and backward, before a stone was laid on a stone in Yahweh’s temple.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: Through all that time, when one came to a heap of twenty measures, there were only ten. When one came to the wine vat to draw out fifty, there were only twenty.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: I struck you with blight, mildew, and hail in all the work of your hands; yet you didn’t turn to me,’ says Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: ‘Consider, please, from this day and backward, from the twenty-fourth day of the ninth month, since the day that the foundation of Yahweh’s temple was laid, consider it.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: Is the seed yet in the barn? Yes, the vine, the fig tree, the pomegranate, and the olive tree haven’t produced. From today I will bless you.’
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: Yahweh’s word came the second time to Haggai in the twenty-fourth day of the month, saying,
Speak to Zerubbabel, governor of Judah, saying, ‘I will shake the heavens and the earth.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: I will overthrow the throne of kingdoms. I will destroy the strength of the kingdoms of the nations. I will overthrow the chariots and those who ride in them. The horses and their riders will come down, everyone by the sword of his brother.
segments.speaker: Haggai

segments.text: In that day, says Yahweh of Armies, I will take you, Zerubbabel my servant, the son of Shealtiel,’ says Yahweh, ‘and will make you like a signet ring, for I have chosen you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.
segments.speaker: Haggai
